name: Day Spa
title: AI Tools for Day Spas | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for day spas — fill the schedule, sell memberships and packages, and keep clients rebooking. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: A day spa runs on a full treatment schedule, repeat visits, and packages that sell. Missed inquiries and clients who don't rebook quietly drain the week. We build the tools that fix that.
drains: Booking inquiries coming in while the front desk is with guests
No-shows and cancellations leaving treatment rooms idle
Packages and memberships that need a consistent, soft sell
Clients who don't rebook their next treatment

tools.title: Booking assistant
tools.body: Every call, form, and message gets an instant reply, the treatment matched to the right provider and room, and a slot booked — so a busy front desk never costs you a guest.

tools.title: Membership & package assistant
tools.body: It introduces memberships and packages at the right moment — after a great first visit, when a package is running low — in your spa's voice, with zero pressure.

tools.title: Rebooking & reminder assistant
tools.body: Confirmations and reminders cut no-shows, and clients get a gentle nudge to rebook their next treatment before they drift away.

tools.title: Daily spa brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's appointments by provider and room, open slots, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A day spa with idle treatment rooms.
cases.before: No-shows and cancellations left rooms empty with no fast way to fill them.
cases.after: Reminders cut no-shows; cancellations get offered to the waitlist.
cases.impact: Representative result: fewer idle rooms and steadier daily revenue.

cases.context: A spa under-selling its membership program.
cases.before: Memberships were mentioned inconsistently, only when staff remembered.
cases.after: Memberships introduced automatically at the right moment, in the spa's voice.
cases.impact: Representative result: a steadier flow of new memberships and packages.

faq.q: Can it help sell memberships without being pushy?
faq.a: Yes. It introduces memberships and packages at natural moments — after a great visit, when a package runs low — in your voice. The tone is warm, never salesy.

faq.q: Can it match a treatment to the right provider and room?
faq.a: Yes. We train it on your providers, treatments, and rooms so every booking lands correctly.

faq.q: Will it work with my spa software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Mindbody, Vagaro, Boulevard, or whatever you already use.
